user_query: My family and I are trying to eat healthier and we want to incorporate more vegetables into our diet. Could you suggest some vegetarian restaurants in London, Amsterdam, Berlin, Stockholm, Barcelona, and Paris? It would be great if you could also provide me with some vegetarian recipes using the Recipe_v4 API.
